bibliographic_info.title: Precise LEO orbit determination using regional PPP-B2b augmentation services

grounding_quotes: <!-- PAGE: 1 -->  Measurement 274 (2026) 121252 Contents lists available at ScienceDirect Measurement journal homepage: www.elsevier.com/locate/measurement Precise LEO orbit determination using regional PPP-B2b augmentation services Haitao Zhoua,c , Lei Wangb,* , Ruizhi Chenc, Jiansheng Lia,d, Mingjian Chena,d, Linyang Lia, Wenju Fue, Kai Xiaoa aInstitute of Geospatial Information, Information Eng
As a free satellite based-augmentation GPS system, the BDS PPP-B2b service also holds potential for improving the orbit determination accuracy of the LEO POD low earth orbit (LEO) satellites.
For clock jump mitigation, we considered two scenarios: 152 to 181 in 2022 is used in this experiment.
